title: Product Cache & Indexing (IndexedDB, 7-day TTL, 50 MB LRU)
description: Implement the product analysis cache in lib/cache/. Backend: IndexedDB (via the storage wrapper from P1.2). TTL: 7 days — stale entries evicted on read. Size cap: 50 MB LRU eviction when storage exceeds budget. Cache keys: ASIN + scrape-date. Stored values: encrypted product data + score breakdown. Enables faster re-analysis and offline access to recent results. Exposes: getCached(), putCached(), evictExpired(), estimateSize(). TDD for TTL eviction and LRU ordering.
